name: @hasna/context
description: Self-hosted documentation context server for AI coding agents — crawl, index, and query library docs via MCP + CLI + HTTP

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external ink --external react --external chalk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && (tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist || true) && sed -i.bak 's|#!/usr/bin/env node|#!/usr/bin/env bun|' dist/cli/index.js dist/mcp/index.js dist/server/index.js && rm -f dist/cli/index.js.bak dist/mcp/index.js.bak dist/server/index.js.bak

author: Andrei Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
